title: Changankulangara Sri Mahadevar Temple
tagline: Changankulangara Sri Mahadevar Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Mahadeva Temple is a Shiva temple at Changankulangara in Kollam in the state of Kerala in India.
overview.description: Mahadeva Temple is a Shiva temple at Changankulangara in Kollam in the state of Kerala in India. It is one of the 108 Shiva temples in India.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Vallikunnam
topPlaces.description: Vallikunnam is a village in Mavelikara taluk of Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Clappana
topPlaces.description: Clappana is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India. Thottathil mukku, Alumpeedika and Puthan Pura Mukku is one of the major junctions in thedistrics..the border kollam alappuzha districts History Legend has it that once the bulls brought to the Ochira temple were tied to palm trees in this area, the place was known as Kalapana and later became Clappana.

topPlaces.name: Thazhava
topPlaces.description: Thazhava is a village in Karunagappally taluk, Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Manappally
topPlaces.description: Manppally is a small village located near Thazhava, Kollam district, Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Oachira Temple
topPlaces.description: Oachira Temple is an ancient temple located in Oachira in Kollam district in the South Indian state of Kerala. According to the Puranas, this temple is one of the famous sacred places of Kerala and India.

topPlaces.name: Changankulangara
topPlaces.description: Changankulangara is a small village in Oachira Panchayath in Kollam district of Kerala, India. Its Changankulangara Sree Mahadevar Temple is one of the ancient temples in South India and one of the 108 Shiva Temples installed by the Lord Parasurama.

topPlaces.name: Oachira
topPlaces.description: Oachira or Ochira (Ōcciṟa) is in the Karunagappalli taluk of Kollam district. Oachira Grama Panchayat came into existence in 1953.

topPlaces.name: Valiyakulangara
topPlaces.description: Valiyakulangara is a small town in Alappuzha district in Kerala, India situated south of Oachira. This village was part of Puthuppally Muri up to 1890 AD. After the 'Kandezhuth' this place was included in the Karunagappally taluk.

items.note: Vallikunnam is a village in Mavelikara taluk of Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala.

Clappana is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India. Thottathil mukku, Alumpeedika and Puthan Pura Mukku is one of the major junctions in thedistrics..the border kollam alappuzha districts History Legend has it that once the bulls brought to the Ochira temple were tied to palm trees in this area, the place was known as Kalapana and later became Clappana.
Thazhava is a village in Karunagappally taluk, Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India.
Manppally is a small village located near Thazhava, Kollam district, Kerala, India.

Oachira Temple is an ancient temple located in Oachira in Kollam district in the South Indian state of Kerala. According to the Puranas, this temple is one of the famous sacred places of Kerala and India.

Changankulangara is a small village in Oachira Panchayath in Kollam district of Kerala, India. Its Changankulangara Sree Mahadevar Temple is one of the ancient temples in South India and one of the 108 Shiva Temples installed by the Lord Parasurama.
Oachira or Ochira (Ōcciṟa) is in the Karunagappalli taluk of Kollam district. Oachira Grama Panchayat came into existence in 1953.

Valiyakulangara is a small town in Alappuzha district in Kerala, India situated south of Oachira. This village was part of Puthuppally Muri up to 1890 AD. After the 'Kandezhuth' this place was included in the Karunagappally taluk.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Changankulangara Sri Mahadevar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Changankulangara Sri Mahadevar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Changankulangara Sri Mahadevar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (82 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (84 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Changankulangara Sri Mahadevar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Changankulangara Sri Mahadevar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Changankulangara Sri Mahadevar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Changankulangara Sri Mahadevar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Changankulangara Sri Mahadevar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vallikunnam, Clappana, Thazhava, Manappally, Oachira Temple.
